calibration_summary: Worker 1 INSUFFICIENT rate 54.6% vs others 9–18% — methodological stringency drift, not parser bug. All 9 sanity checks pass.
recommendation_for_phase_17: (1) Prioritise NEEDS_FIX triples (n=435) for body-text re-verification and rewrite/recitation. (2) Re-verify W1's 521 INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE triples (B0053–B0105) with a body-text fetch — many are likely true VERIFIED under W0/W2/W3 calibration; a smaller subset may upgrade to NEEDS_FIX (genuine misattributions hidden behind conservative verdicts). (3) Top problem cite_keys to inspect first: Pronneke2015 (19 NF / 18 INS), Anastasiades2021a (31 INS), Karnani2016a (31 INS), Pi2013 (27 INS), Wagatsuma2023 (14 NF), Krabbe2019 (13 NF). (4) Sections with worst INSUFFICIENT density — 06_synaptic_properties (278), 07_disinhibition_framework (174), 05_electrophysiology (127) — are the ones whose bodies must be most carefully re-read.
